overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western game showing a foggy night walk through a historic town transitioning to an industrial district at dawn. The player moves along wooden sidewalks and muddy streets, encountering an infected man and passing a horse-drawn carriage, with warm gas lamp illumination cutting through dense fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden sidewalk along historic brick buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered wooden sidewalk next to brick buildings with shuttered windows

entered.detail: red brick building with dark wooden shutters and weathered facade
warm glowing gas lamp mounted on the building wall
overhead wooden roof covering the sidewalk
wet muddy road surface with wooden crossings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy night along a covered wooden sidewalk next to historic brick buildings. Warm gas lamps illuminate the wooden shutters and plank walkway as the camera moves forward under the overhead awning, with the muddy street visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy town street with historic wooden buildings

events.description: encountering an infected man with blood-stained shirt standing against the building wall

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the infected man and moving deeper into the muddy street

notable_agents.action: infected man standing motionless against the wall with pale skin and blood on his shirt

entered.detail: wooden crate or barricade on the muddy ground
two-story building with lit windows in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered sidewalk, the scene opens into a muddy town street where an infected man stands against the wall. The camera passes him and continues through the foggy street, with wooden crates visible on the ground and two-story buildings ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open muddy intersection in town center

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right across the muddy street

agents.ego_description: crossing the muddy street as the carriage passes by

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving from left to right across the intersection

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with crossbars and wires
two-story building with wrought iron balcony railings

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the wide muddy intersection as a horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right. Telegraph poles and buildings with wrought iron balconies line the street, while the fog begins to lift slightly revealing more of the town center.

scene_state.functional_zone: town outskirts transitioning to industrial district

events.description: sky becomes visible as fog lifts, revealing dawn light with blue sky and clouds
transitioning from residential town buildings to industrial factory structures with smokestacks

agents.ego_description: walking through the transitioning landscape from town to industrial area, observing the changing architecture

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with metal scaffolding and lit windows
tall industrial smokestacks against the dawn sky
metal framework structure attached to the factory building

segments.scene_description: As dawn breaks and the fog lifts, revealing a blue sky, the scene transitions from the historic town to an industrial district. The camera passes telegraph poles and approaches a large brick factory with smokestacks and metal scaffolding, while the lighting shifts from artificial to mixed natural dawn light.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial factory yard with metal structures

agents.ego_description: approaching the industrial factory building along the dirt path

entered.detail: large warehouse structure visible in the distance on the left

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the industrial factory complex at dawn. The camera moves closer to the brick building with its metal scaffolding and smokestacks, while the historic town buildings fade into the background. The ground remains muddy with puddles reflecting the early morning light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy historic town at night that gradually transitions into an industrial district at dawn. It begins under the overhead awning of a covered wooden sidewalk, where warm gas lamps illuminate brick buildings and a muddy street. As the camera exits the walkway and enters the open street, it passes an infected man leaning against a wall and continues through the mist past wooden crates and two-story buildings. The scene then expands across a wide muddy intersection as a horse-drawn carriage passes by, while the fog begins to lift to reveal telegraph poles and wrought iron balconies. Finally, as the lighting shifts from artificial glow to the blue light of dawn, the camera moves away from the town center toward a large brick factory complex characterized by smokestacks, metal scaffolding, and light-reflecting puddles.
